Install the bundled SKILL.md into one of several known locations so
Claude Code, OpenCode, or any generic AI agent can discover it.

Run `pura skill` (no args) for an interactive picker, or use the
subcommands for scripting.

Usage:
  pura skill [flags]
  pura skill [command]

Available Commands:
  install     Install a skill (defaults to the built-in pura skill)
  ls          List installed skills across every known target
  rm          Uninstall a skill copy
  run         Print a skill's SKILL.md to stdout

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for skill

Global Flags:
      --api-url string   Override API endpoint
      --handle string    User handle (accepts alice or @alice; defaults to _)
      --jq string        Filter JSON output with jq expression
      --json             Force JSON output
      --profile string   Use named profile
      --quiet            Raw data only (no envelope)
      --token string     Override stored token
  -v, --verbose          Verbose output

Use "pura skill [command] --help" for more information about a command.
